title: Qlog Baseline Verification
scope: Verify the qlog core model and QUIC vocabulary together, with attention to draft-specific envelope rules, event naming, and reciprocal trace links. The verification slice is intentionally bounded to the first baseline and does not imply HTTP/3 or additional protocol vocabularies.
verification_method: Specification conformance checks, focused unit tests, and draft-shape snapshot comparison.
preconditions: The qlog SpecTrace artifacts validate successfully under the repository's JSON validation script.
The first implementation slice exists for the core qlog model and QUIC vocabulary adapter.
The draft source versions recorded in the provenance note have not changed since the baseline was authored.
procedure: Run scripts/Validate-SpecTraceJson.ps1 over the qlog canonical artifacts.
Run unit tests for the core qlog model and QUIC event mapping surface.
Run snapshot or contract tests against representative draft qlog outputs.
Review any failures for draft drift before widening the baseline.
expected_result: The qlog canonical artifacts validate, the first implementation slice matches the draft envelope and QUIC vocabulary requirements, and the baseline stays explicitly draft-aware without claiming broader protocol or sink coverage.
